description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building with a flat roof and a sprawling, rectangular layout. The exterior walls are predominantly white, punctuated by numerous large windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. Several outdoor areas are visible, including a spacious green terrace and a smaller balcony, both enclosed by glass or metal railings. The house features multiple entry points, with the main entrance highlighted by a transparent glass door and a small porch area. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some rooms having floor-to-ceiling windows and others with standard-sized panes. The overall design emphasizes open-plan living, outdoor connectivity, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, white exterior, large windows, and multiple outdoor terraces. The design is open and minimalist, with asymmetrical window placement and a prominent glass entryway.
description_view_0: This view shows the main entrance with a glass door and porch, as well as several large windows and a glimpse into the interior layout.
description_view_1: From this angle, the green terrace and balcony are prominent, along with additional windows and a secondary entry point.
description_view_2: This side highlights the spacious outdoor terrace with green flooring, glass railings, and more large windows facing the garden area.
description_view_3: The rear view reveals additional windows, a secondary outdoor area, and the overall rectangular footprint of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and floor-to-ceiling panes
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a glass door, small porch, and minimal overhang, emphasizing transparency and simplicity.
